name: c4
description: Spawn, supervise, and merge parallel Claude Code workers from inside Claude Code via slash commands.
author: siloFoX

commands.name: c4-new
commands.description: Create a new C4 worker. Usage: /c4-new <name>

commands.name: c4-task
commands.description: Send a task to a worker (creates one if needed). Usage: /c4-task <name> <task...>

commands.name: c4-read
commands.description: Read latest output from a worker. Usage: /c4-read <name>

commands.name: c4-dispatch
commands.description: Dispatch a task to the best peer (uses 9.7 dispatcher). Usage: /c4-dispatch <task...>

daemon._comment: Override if c4 daemon runs on a non-default endpoint.
